what: Restore the exact v263 fused-path hint set as a fresh confirmation candidate
why: Recent split-K follow-ups either regressed, hit quota, or invalidated the Gluon reduce path, while v263 remains the strongest fixed-input result in this branch. Replaying the exact v263 code on a new version gives a clean benchmark confirmation after the recent branch churn and is the best candidate to spend a scarce leaderboard slot on once quota and confidence line up.
override: This overlaps with prior v263 confirmation work, but the exact code path remains the strongest candidate and recent experiments changed the working tree without producing a better validated replacement.

what: Add only the load-side tl.max_contiguous hint on top of the exact v263 baseline
why: The exact v263 branch remains the best validated fixed-input candidate, and the most surgical unmeasured follow-up is the archived load-side-only contiguity hint from v266. It changes only the bf16 input lane vector in the two-phase quant kernel, avoids the store-side contiguity regression path from v265, and was never actually tested because quota blocked both submissions.
override: This overlaps with archived compiler-hint work, but the exact load-side-only variant never received real test or benchmark data because both submissions were quota-blocked.
